features: Multifunctional for Manicure & Pedicure:Our advanced compact nail drill features a powerful upgraded motor that guarantees smooth operation even at high speeds of up to 25,000 RPM, while maintaining low heat, noise, and vibration. You can easily select the appropriate speed and switch forward/reverse rotation. This tool is essential for beginners, professional nail technicians, and nail enthusiasts alike.

Cordless,Easy to Use:No messy cords annoying! Our PC180G cordless nail drill is lightweight at just 0.17 lbs, making it easy to use and carry with you wherever you go. Its pen-shaped design ensures a comfortable grip, LED screen design making it easy to view accurate speed information, making it user-friendly for beginners! Also a perfect gift for female friends.

Quiet,Low Heat and Durable:Compact and lightweight design, combined with a powerful motor, provides a quiet experience with low vibration and low heat. This makes it comfortable to hold and easy to carry, allowing you to create your nail artwork anytime, anywhere.

6 Hours Long-lasting Battery Life:With a large battery capacity, you can use this nail drill anywhere, anytime. After being fully charged for about 1 hour, the electric nail file will operate for up to 6 hours. Your operational status is displayed on the smart LED screen, including RPM and direction, making it all clear at a glance.

What's in the package: 1xPC180G Nail Drill, 1* Type-C Charging Cable, 6* Drill Bits and 6*Sanding Bands. This electric nail file can be used for grinding, carving, cutting, polishing, and removing gel nail polish, cuticles, and dead skin without harming your hands or nails. You can easily switch out the desired nail drill bit, making it a professional choice for acrylic nails.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Avoid using the device near water or in humid environments. Allow the device to cool down if used continuously for long periods. Clean the drill bits and device after each use; keep air vents clear. Store in a dry, safe place away from children.
